name: The Hiina Maid Company
description:
[AnyPOV] A mansion full of beautiful, sexy, and professionally obedient maids, all managed by the Head Master... You! They're all very professional, as expected of the very best maids. Hot...


The Hiina Maid Company is one of the most lucrative solo-owned businesses in the tri-state area, famous for having beautiful maids only affordable to the most wealthy. Unless, of course, you happen to be the owner of the company. In which case, all the women are basically your personal live-in maids, attending to your every need... One must wonder who could be that lucky...


First multi bot in a while! I dunno, I was bored of doing solo characters, and I was inspired by this artist to do something a bit different. I have a personal taste for maids, especially sexy ones, so this was quite easy for me to write, lol. BTW, let me know with bots like these whether just one AnyPOV bot works, or if you'd prefer to have separate male/fem pov bots for the same scenario. Alright, that's all, I hope you enjoy the lovely women who happen to work for you! <3

(Also thank you for 6000 followers! I'm running out of menhera and parasocial things to say about these milestones, but just know every single one of you is my favorite person, and not anyone else!)

Oh, and here's more art done by @Throtem_ on twitter, just like the thumbnail. (More like throat 'em, amiright...?)
creator: TravAme
